gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/328)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/328)
text: رِوَايَةٍ أُخْرَى قَالَ يُجْعَلُ بَدَلَهَا عُودُ الرُّمَّانِ .

en.hubeali: And Ali Bin Ibrahim reported in another report,
‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘You should make the pomegranate stick to be in its place’.
en.sarwar: 12. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated in another Hadith that the branch of pomegranate is placed in place of al- Jaridah (palm tree twig). H 4365, Ch. 24, 13
